return_reason_raw: The base keeps moving in my back seat and my car only has lap belts in the middle row.
prevention_signal: Vehicle profile shows lap-belt-only seating position selected during checkout.

return_reason_raw: I cannot use the support leg because my SUV has storage compartments under that seat.
prevention_signal: Missing answer to support-leg floor compartment compatibility question.

return_reason_raw: My car has no top tether anchor so this seat cannot be installed safely.
prevention_signal: No top tether anchor available in saved vehicle data.

return_reason_raw: There is no shoulder belt in our center seat, so the booster is useless for us.
prevention_signal: Checkout did not validate shoulder-belt requirement for selected seating position.

return_reason_raw: The seat base rocks because my rear seats are too bucket-shaped.
prevention_signal: Vehicle seat contour warning not shown for deeply sculpted seats.

return_reason_raw: Buckle stalk is too short and the belt path twists every time I tighten it.
prevention_signal: Buckle stalk length check missing in compatibility wizard.

return_reason_raw: Front airbag in my car cannot be switched off and this seat cannot go in the back due to space.
prevention_signal: Airbag disable status was not collected before purchase.

return_reason_raw: The seat cannot rotate fully because it hits my door frame.
prevention_signal: Door-side clearance value was below required rotation clearance.

return_reason_raw: The shell touches the headrest badly in my sedan and never sits flush.
prevention_signal: Headrest clearance conflict identified from vehicle model database.

return_reason_raw: My rear seat angle is too reclined and the installer said this model is not allowed.
prevention_signal: Seatback angle requirement not surfaced in product recommendation flow.

return_reason_raw: Booster back does not sit flat because my fixed headrest pushes it forward.
prevention_signal: Fixed headrest geometry warning should trigger pre-purchase alert.

return_reason_raw: It did not fit the airline seat width on our trip, so we could not use it at all.
prevention_signal: Airline cabin seat width compatibility check skipped at checkout.

return_reason_raw: The bodysuit is too tight on my 2-month-old, especially around the legs.
prevention_signal: Baby weight entered above upper range for selected size pack.

return_reason_raw: My daughter is 8 months but very tall and this sleeper is already short.
prevention_signal: Length percentile input suggests sizing up recommendation.

return_reason_raw: My baby is only 9 months and still mouths everything, so this shape toy is not suitable.
prevention_signal: Age under 12 months should block recommendation for wooden block toys.

return_reason_raw: I ordered this for my 4-month-old but it clearly says no infant use without insert.
prevention_signal: Child age in profile below stroller minimum age requirement.

return_reason_raw: I accidentally bought stage 2 for my newborn and cannot use it.
prevention_signal: Infant age under 6 months conflicts with selected formula stage.

return_reason_raw: My son is 10 months, I did not realize this goat formula starts from 12 months.
prevention_signal: Formula age gate should warn when child age is below minimum months.

return_reason_raw: My child is only 13kg so this booster is too early for him.
prevention_signal: Child weight below booster minimum should suppress add-to-cart.

return_reason_raw: My baby is 7 months and cannot use this walker yet.
prevention_signal: Minimum age requirement should be highlighted in bold at checkout.

return_reason_raw: My baby started rolling last week so I cannot swaddle anymore.
prevention_signal: Rolling milestone prompt should suggest sleep sack instead of swaddle.

return_reason_raw: The bib neck is too small for my toddler, it keeps pulling and she hates it.
prevention_signal: Neck circumference input exceeded product fit range.

return_reason_raw: I expected a larger storage basket; it does not fit my diaper bag at all.
prevention_signal: Basket capacity comparison card not shown before purchase.

return_reason_raw: These cups are much smaller than they looked in the photos.
prevention_signal: Size reference image with hand scale was missing.

return_reason_raw: I thought the denim would be stretchy, but it is stiff and hard to move in.
prevention_signal: Fabric stretch rating was not visible on product highlights.

return_reason_raw: I assumed this had ISOFIX but it installs with seat belt only.
prevention_signal: Installation type filter mismatch between user preference and selected item.

return_reason_raw: I expected immediate colic relief in one day, but there was no quick change.
prevention_signal: Educational note on realistic response time was not presented.

return_reason_raw: I thought this reclined fully flat for newborn naps, but it does not.
prevention_signal: Recline angle limitation should be shown in quick specs summary.

return_reason_raw: I expected a firmer teether, this one is too soft for my baby.
prevention_signal: Texture firmness scale not displayed in product attributes.

return_reason_raw: I expected this sleep suit to be lightweight, but it is too warm for Dubai weather.
prevention_signal: Climate suitability tag should have been displayed prominently.

return_reason_raw: The front wheel arrived wobbling and drifts left even on smooth floors.
prevention_signal: Post-assembly wheel alignment quality check failed but was not detected.

return_reason_raw: Rotation lock button gets stuck and does not click into drive position.
prevention_signal: Mechanical lock test should be part of outbound inspection.

return_reason_raw: One hanging toy detached from the stitch after two days.
prevention_signal: Stitch pull-strength lot test should flag weak seams.

return_reason_raw: The tin seal was already broken when I opened the package.
prevention_signal: Warehouse seal integrity scan should reject compromised cans.

return_reason_raw: One bodysuit had a broken snap button right out of the pack.
prevention_signal: Snap-fastener durability test did not catch this unit.

return_reason_raw: Harness adjuster strap is frayed and feels unsafe.
prevention_signal: Final harness webbing inspection should detect fray defects.

return_reason_raw: My baby has cow milk protein allergy and reacted after two feeds.
prevention_signal: Allergy profile indicates CMPA and should block standard dairy formula.

return_reason_raw: We need hypoallergenic formula, this one was not suitable for his allergy.
prevention_signal: No allergy-safe recommendation funnel triggered for known dairy allergy.

return_reason_raw: I bought this for colic but my pediatrician said not for diagnosed allergy.
prevention_signal: Medical condition disclaimer should require confirmation before purchase.

return_reason_raw: This is lactose-free, but my child has milk protein allergy, not lactose issue.
prevention_signal: Differentiate lactose intolerance vs milk protein allergy in decision helper.

return_reason_raw: We selected anti-reflux by mistake, but baby needs amino acid formula for allergy.
prevention_signal: Allergy-specific recommendation path should override symptom-only choices.

return_reason_raw: Rash got worse and doctor confirmed dairy allergy, so we cannot continue this.
prevention_signal: Symptom questionnaire should flag rash plus family allergy history risk.

return_reason_raw: I thought goat milk means allergy-safe, but baby still reacted badly.
prevention_signal: Goat milk allergy misconception warning should be displayed pre-checkout.

return_reason_raw: Bought this without checking ingredients; child is allergic to milk proteins.
prevention_signal: Ingredient allergy alert banner should appear for saved allergy profile.

return_reason_raw: My existing Cybex infant seat does not click into this stroller at all.
prevention_signal: Cross-brand adapter incompatibility warning should trigger from saved car seat brand.

return_reason_raw: I assumed universal adapters were included, but my seat is not supported.
prevention_signal: Adapter inclusion and compatibility matrix not acknowledged before payment.

return_reason_raw: The adapter I bought separately still does not lock with our infant carrier.
prevention_signal: Adapter generation mismatch should be detected by compatibility checker.

return_reason_raw: We cannot attach either of our two car seats to this twin stroller.
prevention_signal: Twin stroller compatibility list should filter by both seat models.

return_reason_raw: I bought this for travel system use but there is no adapter for our seat brand.
prevention_signal: Travel system compatibility prompt was skipped during product discovery.

return_reason_raw: The stroller works fine alone, but our Nuna car seat cannot be attached safely.
prevention_signal: Saved car seat ecosystem should constrain stroller recommendations.
